tasks.title: Initialize project structure
tasks.description: Create CLI application scaffold using Crust framework with TypeScript configuration
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for CLI command parsing before implementation
TDD: Test fails when Crust configuration is missing
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Configure LanceDB integration
tasks.description: Set up LanceDB connection and database initialization logic
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for database initialization before implementation
TDD: Test fails when LanceDB connection fails
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Create embedding service abstraction
tasks.description: Implement embedding service interface with support for cloud and local providers
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for embedding service interface before implementation
TDD: Test fails when embedding provider is not configured
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement LanceDB schema definition
tasks.description: FR-1: Define vector table schema with fields: id, vector, project_id, context_type, content, metadata, session_id, created_at, expires_at, salience
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for schema creation before implementation
TDD: Test fails when schema fields are missing
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement pre-session context retrieval
tasks.description: FR-2: Query LanceDB for relevant semantic data and inject into LLM session context
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for context retrieval query before implementation
TDD: Test fails when no context is retrieved
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement post-session context persistence
tasks.description: FR-3: Extract session summary and persist to LanceDB with embeddings
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for context extraction before implementation
TDD: Test fails when context is not persisted
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement OpenCode plugin hook integration
tasks.description: FR-4: Register hooks for session.created, session.idle, file.edited, command.executed, tool.execute.after, message.updated, todo.updated
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for hook registration before implementation
TDD: Test fails when hooks are not triggered
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement context weighting algorithm
tasks.description: FR-5: Calculate priority scores using cosine similarity, type weight, recency decay, and manual salience
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for scoring algorithm before implementation
TDD: Test fails when score calculation is incorrect
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement context window management
tasks.description: FR-6: Truncate context to maxContextTokens (default 4096) while preserving highest-priority records
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for token truncation before implementation
TDD: Test fails when context exceeds token limit
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement semantic deduplication
tasks.description: FR-7: Detect and merge records with cosine similarity > 0.95, keeping most recent
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for deduplication logic before implementation
TDD: Test fails when duplicates are not detected
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement embedding failure recovery
tasks.description: Edge Cases: Retry with exponential backoff, use cached vectors, queue for batch, fallback to local model
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for failure recovery before implementation
TDD: Test fails when recovery strategies are not attempted
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement database corruption recovery
tasks.description: Edge Cases: Detect corruption, create new DB, notify user, restore from backup
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for corruption detection before implementation
TDD: Test fails when corruption is not detected
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement sensitive data redaction
tasks.description: Edge Cases: Filter API keys, passwords, secrets from stored content using regex patterns
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for redaction before implementation
TDD: Test fails when sensitive data is not redacted
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement graceful degradation
tasks.description: Edge Cases: Continue session when context unavailable, log warnings, skip persistence
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for degradation behavior before implementation
TDD: Test fails when session continues without context
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement init command
tasks.description: CLI: llmngn init [--embedding-model <model>] - Initialize plugin in current project
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for init command before implementation
TDD: Test fails when command does not create config
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement query command
tasks.description: CLI: llmngn query <text> [--limit <n>] [--type <type>] - Query stored context
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for query command before implementation
TDD: Test fails when query returns no results
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement history command
tasks.description: CLI: llmngn history [--sessions <n>] - Show session history
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for history command before implementation
TDD: Test fails when history is not displayed
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement export/import commands
tasks.description: CLI: llmngn export [--output <path>] and import <path> - Backup and restore context
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for export/import before implementation
TDD: Test fails when data is not exported/imported correctly
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement purge command
tasks.description: CLI: llmngn purge [--force] - Clear stored context
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for purge command before implementation
TDD: Test fails when database is not cleared
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement stats command
tasks.description: CLI: llmngn stats - Show database statistics
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for stats command before implementation
TDD: Test fails when statistics are not displayed
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement configuration file parser
tasks.description: Parse and validate .opencode/plugins/llmngn.json configuration
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for config parsing before implementation
TDD: Test fails when invalid config is not rejected
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement CLI config subcommands
tasks.description: CLI: llmngn config set/get/list - Manage configuration
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for config commands before implementation
TDD: Test fails when config is not updated
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement schema versioning
tasks.description: Track schema version and support migrations between versions
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for version tracking before implementation
TDD: Test fails when version is not tracked
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement warmup strategy for existing codebases
tasks.description: Phase adoption: discovery (write-only) → warming → active (read-write)
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for warmup phases before implementation
TDD: Test fails when phases are not enforced
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement structured logging
tasks.description: Log all operations in JSON format with timestamp, level, event, sessionId, metrics
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for logging format before implementation
TDD: Test fails when logs are not structured correctly
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Implement metrics collection
tasks.description: Track query latency, embedding success rate, database growth, token count, deduplication ratio
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for metrics collection before implementation
TDD: Test fails when metrics are not recorded
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Write unit tests for core logic
tasks.description: Unit tests for embedding service, query builder, weighting algorithm, deduplication, redaction
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for test structure before implementation
TDD: Test fails when coverage is below 80%
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Write integration tests
tasks.description: Integration tests for full session lifecycle, context retrieval, corruption recovery, failure handling
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for integration setup before implementation
TDD: Test fails when integration scenarios fail
TDD: Refactor after test passes

tasks.title: Write E2E tests
tasks.description: E2E tests for cold start, warm start, multi-session, cross-project, failure recovery
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for E2E framework before implementation
TDD: Test fails when E2E flows fail
TDD: Refactor after test passes

rules: Write test first (RED) - test must fail
Write minimal code to pass (GREEN) - no optimization
Refactor after test passes (REFACTOR) - maintain quality
All tasks must follow TDD cycle as acceptance criteria
